title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at PropEquity

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at PropEquity
jsonLd.description:
PropEquity, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PropEquity:
PropEquity is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropEquity!
